case_title: LOREN DUNTON VS PRESS CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO THE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOREN DUNTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRESS CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO THE $726.97 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $734.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
